title: Close final 2 standing failures: #7 wire human REJECT->REJECTED, #12 relax zone test to argmax
intent: The last 2 api-verify/Core CI standing failures were held as product decisions; the user chose #7=OptionA (wire) and #12=OptionB (relax). Both live in IBG/morphology code governance-classified BLOCKED_PROVENANCE (non-authoritative, no user-facing path). #7: BodyEvidenceCandidate.record_review transitioned authority on APPROVE (->HUMAN_REVIEWED) but had no symmetric REJECT branch, so a human REJECT never moved authority to the terminal REJECTED state and the intake gate's rejection-status check (Gate 8 / CANDIDATE_REJECTED) never fired -> test_rejected_candidate_stays_blocked failed on the missing reason. #12: the zone classifier sum-normalizes weights across all matching zones, and body-spanning zones (centerline, left_flank) plus overlapping bridge_region tie with lower_bout for the test point, so no positional zone can exceed 0.5; primary_zone (argmax) is already correct, only the absolute >0.5 assertion was wrong. Closes standing failures 2->0.
behavior_change: IBG-only: a human REJECT now transitions candidate authority to the terminal REJECTED state (BLOCKED_PROVENANCE R&D code, no user-facing/live consumer). #12 is test-only.

diff_articulation.what_changed: (#7, Option A) services/api/app/instrument_geometry/body/ibg/body_evidence_candidate.py::record_review — added a symmetric human-REJECT branch mirroring the existing human-APPROVE branch: for reviewer_id.startswith('human:'), APPROVE transitions authority to HUMAN_REVIEWED (unchanged) and REJECT now transitions to AuthorityState.REJECTED (guarded by can_transition_to, valid from ADVISORY_CANDIDATE/HUMAN_REVIEWED/SANDBOX_EXPERIMENTAL). This activates the intake gate's already-built Gate 8 (_check_rejection_status -> CANDIDATE_REJECTED) and the REJECTED terminal-state resurrection guards (FORBIDDEN_TRANSITIONS), which previously had no production trigger. Machine REJECT is unaffected (ReviewEnforcement.record_review already raises ReviewBypassAttemptError for system actors before this branch). (#12, Option B) services/api/tests/test_ibg_morphology_primitives.py::test_classify_lower_bout_point — replaced the absolute assert zone_weights['lower_bout'] > 0.5 with assert zone_weights['lower_bout'] == max(zone_weights.values()), matching the classifier's de-facto argmax contract (classify_point sum-normalizes across all matching zones; centerline/left_flank/bridge_region tie with lower_bout so no positional zone can exceed 0.5). primary_zone assertion unchanged; no production code touched for #12.
diff_articulation.why_not_redundant: #7 fixes a real wiring asymmetry (APPROVE propagated to authority, REJECT did not), turning the documented 'REJECTED is terminal / cannot be resurrected' invariant from production-dead (previously reachable only via test-only manual transitions) into an enforced path; no currently-passing test asserted REJECT leaves authority unchanged (verified). #12's >0.5 assertion is asserted by this one test only and is contradicted by the classifier's own normalization; every sibling test and both primary_zone consumers (variant_grammar) already rely on argmax, so relaxing to argmax matches the real contract rather than weakening it.

commands_run: services/api venv (py3.11.9): pytest tests/test_ibg_constitutional_integration.py tests/test_ibg_intake_gate.py tests/test_ibg_morphology_primitives.py tests/test_governance_constitutional_runtime.py -q -> see PR body (all green; #7 + #12 targets pass, siblings unaffected)

#7 root cause + blast radius mapped by read-only investigation: record_review had no REJECT->authority branch; AuthorityState.REJECTED valid from ADVISORY_CANDIDATE (authority_state.py); Gate 8 reads authority==REJECTED (ibg_intake_gate.py:296); no test asserts REJECT leaves authority ADVISORY_CANDIDATE

#12 math confirmed: point (-0.5,0.25) ties lower_bout/bridge_region/left_flank/centerline at 1.0 pre-normalization -> 0.25 each; >0.5 unachievable; argmax (=primary_zone) correct; >0.5 asserted only by this test

files.intent: #7 Option A: symmetric human-REJECT branch -> authority REJECTED (activates Gate 8 / CANDIDATE_REJECTED)
files.behavior_change: IBG BLOCKED_PROVENANCE R&D only; human REJECT now terminal, no live consumer

files.intent: #12 Option B: relax lower_bout weight assertion from >0.5 to == max (argmax contract)
